data.body:
KICKOFF — /rebar-implement on epic 9d50-ead1-de68-4362 (unrational-expansive-catfish).
TREE: flat, depth 1. 8 leaves under epic, all open, unassigned. Only dep edge: b9c0 depends_on 9f25.
  Stories: 9f25 (derive code-review block threshold from adjudicated data; analysis+artifacts), b9c0 (enable serious-tier blocking at derived threshold; deps 9f25), d4cf (new plan-review criterion G7 parent-containment).
  Tasks: 24ec (persist completion-verifier FAIL verdicts), 74d9 (completion-verifier enumerate ALL unmet criteria), ac0e (docs: no signature demands in epic ACs), e1f2 (docs: loosen advisory-remediation mandate), f32e (impact_code lane gap: add maint binary, bump code-v2->code-v3).
GATES: plan-review-for-claim=ON, completion-verification-for-close=ON, ticket-for-commit=ON.
LANDING: rebar/Gerrit. Push stacked to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main; commits carry rebar-ticket trailer + DCO Signed-off-by; submit stack top once LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1.
ENV: worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-9d50 branch epic/9d50-calibration-followup @ origin/main 6244666e5; local .venv; hooks installed; API key present.
